notes: Pickleheads' own summary text repeats '3 locations with 9 outdoor pickleball courts' across multiple searches, which exactly matches summing Cedar Rose Park (4) + James Kenney Park (1) + Ocean View Park (4) = 9. However, the city index page (site:pickleheads.com/courts/us/california/berkeley) actually links to 5 distinct venue detail pages, also including Neighborhood Pickleball - Rooftop - Level 6 and Claremont Club and Spa. The stated '3 locations' total appears to only count free/public courts and excludes the 2 private membership clubs, even though those clubs have their own Pickleheads detail pages under the same city slug. All 5 are recorded below since the task scope is 'every venue Pickleheads lists for Berkeley'.

venues.name: Cedar Rose Park Pickleball Courts
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court — dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets
venues.price: Free play; $7/hr reservation (Berkeley's civicrec booking system separately lists $7/hr resident, $8/hr non-resident)
venues.hours: Mon closed; Tue–Fri 10am–8pm; Sat–Sun 10am–6pm (park itself open 6am–10pm daily)
venues.weather: Mild flatland Berkeley, occasional bay-adjacent fog
venues.notes: Pickleheads' page title uses 'Cedar Rose Park Pickleball Courts'; existing courts-data.json entry uses the shorter 'Cedar Rose Park' for the same venue (matched by address, id kept as existing cedar-rose-park). New info vs baseline: amenities list (restrooms/water/wheelchair/quiet balls) and the free-walk-up-vs-paid-reservation nuance — baseline only had a flat '$7–8/hr' price.

venues.name: James Kenney Park Pickleball Court
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court — dedicated court with permanent net and lines
venues.price: Free walk-up; $7/hr resident, $8/hr non-resident reservation (reduced rates for youth/seniors/disabled)
venues.weather: Mild flatland Berkeley, occasional bay-adjacent fog
venues.notes: Fills in price and reservable, both 'Not specified' in existing baseline. Existing baseline's neighborhood value ('Near downtown Berkeley') was not corroborated by any source checked here, so this record leaves neighborhood 'Not specified' rather than assuming it — not a contradiction, just unconfirmed by these sources.

venues.name: Ocean View Park
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court — dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets
venues.weather: Mild flatland Berkeley, occasional bay-adjacent fog
venues.notes: LIKELY MISCATEGORIZED BY PICKLEHEADS — flag for human review before merging. This venue's real street address (900 Buchanan St) is in Albany, CA 94706, not Berkeley; Buchanan St runs along the Berkeley/Albany border. Pickleheads lists the SAME venue on two separate pages with matching details (4 courts, same amenities): one under the berkeley city slug and one under the albany city slug (pickleheads.com/courts/us/california/albany/ocean-view-park). Court count and amenities were consistent across every source checked, so those facts aren't in doubt — confirmed is set to false purely because the city/address assignment is unresolved, not because of the court data itself. lat/lon left null (no source gave a precise geocode, and this repo's convention is not to guess one).

venues.name: Neighborhood Pickleball - Rooftop - Level 6
venues.address: 2061 Allston Way, Berkeley, CA (6th floor / Level 6 of the parking garage; exact ZIP not confirmed by sources checked, likely 94704)
venues.surface: Outdoor concrete — dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets
venues.price: Membership required (membership capped at 75; no separate per-visit court fees for members)
venues.weather: Mild flatland Berkeley, occasional bay-adjacent fog
venues.notes: Private membership club on the 6th-floor rooftop of a Downtown Berkeley parking garage; membership capped at 75. Court count (3) and general description corroborated across Pickleheads, the club's own site, and Daily Cal's coverage of the project. Exact hours, per-visit reservation mechanics (vs. members-only access), and a precise ZIP were not stated by any source checked — left 'Not specified' rather than guessed.

venues.name: Claremont Club and Spa
venues.neighborhood: Claremont (Berkeley Hills, at the Berkeley/Oakland border)
venues.surface: Outdoor concrete and hard court — dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets
venues.hours: Open Play Mon 8–11am (Courts 1–4); Twilight Round Robin 4:30pm; Night Round Robin 6:30pm; additional open play/programs vary by day
venues.weather: Mild flatland Berkeley, occasional bay-adjacent fog
venues.notes: As of March 2025 the property rebranded from 'Claremont Club & Spa, A Fairmont Hotel' to 'Claremont Resort & Club' (per Berkeleyside); Pickleheads still lists it under the older name 'Claremont Club and Spa', which is why this record keeps that name for pickleheadsUrl matching. Property sits at the Berkeley/Oakland line at the foot of Claremont Canyon — some sources geocode it to Oakland, but the street address and Pickleheads both place it in Berkeley 94705. Private club, membership required for pickleball; reserve via front desk (510-549-8517) or text (510-283-9833), starting 8am the day before play.
